subject: Your mentor has received your request
html:
Hi {{first_name}},

We've received your request and passed it on to your mentor. They'll usually reach out within a couple of days by email (or using the contact details you shared, if any). If you don't hear back, drop us a line at hello@openmentor.io and we'll find out what happened.

Here are the details of your request:

Mentor: {{mentor_name}}

Request: {{request_details}}

Price: {{request_price}}

Have a great session, and good luck! ❤️

The OpenMentor Team

This is an automated message from OpenMentor

https://openmentor.io
